title: Air Force Research Laboratory
text:
The Air Force Research Lab (AFRL), on behalf of the Department of the Air Force (DAF), is developing an innovative business process to connect potential partners seeking to collaborate with the Air Force and Space Force science and technology (S&T) enterprise through a virtual front door, AirForceTechConnect.org.
This website provides access to current, open opportunities, meet-up events, other DAF S&T connectors, and a way for anyone to share an idea with us. By accelerating this connection capability, we will deepen and expand the DAF’s S&T enterprise and make it easier and faster for industry, academia, small business, individuals and other government laboratories to connect with the right DAF S&T experts and opportunities.
